steps.title: Use the time marker
steps.content: The sentence begins with "By the time," so the blank must fit a past point by which another past action had already happened. The phrase "had drastically increased" shows that the cattle population had already increased at that point.

steps.title: Eliminate tense errors
steps.content: Choice B, "will ascend," uses future tense, but the sentence describes past events. Choice C, "ascends," uses present tense, and Choice D, "is ascending," uses present progressive tense; neither fits the past-tense context. Choice A, "ascended," uses simple past tense, which correctly identifies the past point when the cattle population had already increased. The answer is A.
